arts.ttl: PLAY TEAMSHEET: Can YOU remember the Liverpool team from their epic 5-4 victory against Norwich City in January 2016?
arts.sum: Every day we'll challenge you to name a different starting XI from the Premier League era. We'll give you a team's rough formation, and the number of letters in each player's name. Then it's up to you!

arts.ttl: Diogo Jota new Liverpool fitness plan revealed as point made over Rodri injury
arts.sum: Arne Slot explains the plan for keeping Diogo Jota fit this season after the Liverpool striker's brace in the 5-1 win over West Ham United in the Carabao Cup

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool move on to new midfield target after Martin Zubimendi rejection
arts.sum: Liverpool have started the season well in all the competitions. Under the leadership of new manager Arne Slot, the Reds have done well in the Premier League, Champions League and the EFL Cup. Despite a quiet summer transfer window, in which only Federico Chiesa arrived at the club, Liverpool have performed well and shown that […] The post Report: Liverpool move on to new midfield target after Martin Zubimendi rejection appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: West Ham manager Julen Lopetegui fumes at Liverpool goal decision amid VAR confusion
arts.sum: Liverpool were resounding winners in their Carabao Cup third round tie against Premier League opposition on Wednesday night - but the West Ham United manager was not happy.

arts.ttl: Liverpool blamed for Trent Alexander-Arnold uncertainty as Real Madrid theory emerges
arts.sum: Former Liverpool defender Glen Johnson was asked about what winning trophies at Real Madrid could mean for Trent Alexander-Arnold and how Reds fans would react if he left

arts.ttl: Liverpool 5-1 West Ham: Player ratings as Jota and Gakpo see off 10-man Hammers
arts.sum: LM: Cody Gakpo - 9/10 - Rarely gave the ball away and was a helpful outlet for Liverpool as they looked to stretch West Ham's defence. A Jarell Quansah own goal had seen the visitors lead early doors, but the game was turned on its head by Diogo Jota goals either side of half-time.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot shares honest Federico Chiesa verdict after full Liverpool debut
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa made his full Liverpool debut in Wednesday night's 5-1 thrashing of West Ham United
